top_signals.title: Stocks Waver as US-Iran Tensions Offset CPI Relief: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, but left stocks wavering amid heightened geopolitical tensions that are keeping energy costs elevated and threatening further price pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Cuba Poised for Biggest US Fuel Shipment Since Cold War Embargo
top_signals.summary: A Florida trading company is in advanced talks to send Cuba the biggest cargo of US fuel since the Eisenhower administration as the island nation contends with an acute energy crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: El Niño Emerges in Pacific, Raising Heat and Crop Risks
top_signals.summary: El Niño has formed across the equatorial Pacific, setting the stage for months of droughts, floods and temperature fluctuations that will threaten communities worldwide along with agriculture and energy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Amazon trucking expansion sparks freight stock sell-off
top_signals.summary: Amazon has been spinning out more of its in-house logistics offerings for others to access, posing a growing threat to industry incumbents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid, Paradigm urge revision of GENIUS money-laundering rule
top_signals.summary: The Hyperliquid Policy Center and Paradigm say the Treasury’s money-laundering rules for the GENIUS Act are too onerous for stablecoin issuers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Joining up services for people facing multiple disadvantage
top_signals.summary: Policy Lab worked with MHCLG's Changing Futures programme to shape services around the lived experience of people facing multiple disadvantage.

top_signals.title: Michael Saylor gets into public debate over claims that Strategy's latest share sale was dilutive
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley's Wilson Sees Big Shift From 60/40 Strategy
top_signals.summary: Mike Wilson, Morgan Stanley's chief US equity strategist and CIO, says the recent equity and debt offerings signal a healthy market. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Wilson says there's enough capital out there to absorb all of the recent IPO activity. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Bill Gates says 'I should have never met' with Jeffrey Epstein 'in the first place'
top_signals.summary: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel.

top_signals.title: Pentagon reveals preferred munitions for one-way attack drones
top_signals.summary: The list includes Northrop Grumman and several startups competing to supply low-cost payloads compatible with any drone design.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO nears 4 times oversubscribed, squeezing crypto and tech
top_signals.summary: Tech stocks and crypto are selling off in a “classic pre-mega-IPO liquidity squeeze,” say analysts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: COC Boosts Offshore Capabilities with Newbuild AHTS Vessel
alerts.summary: Caspian Offshore Construction (COC) has acquired an anchor handling tug supply (AHTS) vessel from Sinopacific Engineering & Contracting (SPEC), marking the first vessel in the SPA90 series to join the Kazakh offshore marine service provider's fleet.The shipbuilding contract was signed on April 30…
